commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
At us. See Psalm lxxviii. 4. (Haydock)
Such was the condition of Jeremias, xv. 10. (Calmet)
Hebrew, "have scoffed among themselves. "Chaldean and St. Jerome agree with us. Scorn is more difficult to bear than poverty. Hence to comfort himself, the psalmist repeats, O God (Berthier)
